chat.subtitle: Type an idea. We validate it, then break it down into a feature tree, PRD, BRD, database and system design, and a task list — ready for your AI coding agent.
chat.placeholder: e.g. A honest sparring partner that stops indie hackers from building products nobody wants.
chat.detailsHint: Add target user, constraints, or notes (optional)
chat.targetUserPlaceholder: e.g. Indonesian solo devs shipping side projects at night
chat.constraintsPlaceholder: e.g. Solo, 8 weeks, must run on free tiers
chat.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Competitors you know of, prior attempts
chat.empty: You have no projects yet — type an idea above.

login.title: Sign in to continue
login.modalSubtitle: Your idea is safe. Pick a way to sign in and we'll pick right back up.
login.subtitle: Validate first, then build. Sign in to start turning ideas into blueprints.
login.sentTitle: Check your email — we sent you a magic link to sign in.

dashboard.newSub: We validate it first — then build the tree, PRD, and tasks.
dashboard.emptyBody: Create your first project above — it takes about a minute to a verdict.
